title: Dark Mod Extension (DME)
description:
Fork of DDM, the essence of which is wider support for dark mode mods for large modpacks

Форк DDM, суть которого заключается в более широкой поддержке модов темного режима для больших модпаков
body:
# Dark Mod Extension (DME)
Fork of the resource pack Default Dark Mode the essence of which is to have support for a wide range of modifications

I make and test themes on 1.20.1+, which is why the theme may not work correctly on older versions

I'm always happy to help you with bugs or make a dark theme for your favorite mod on my discord: [https://discord.gg/ZB3QpNdZUP](https://discord.gg/ZB3QpNdZUP)

<details>
<summary>Made or fixed the original dark theme</summary>

- Accessories
- Alex's Caves
- Alex's Mobs
- Curios API
- Create
- Create: Misc and Things
- Create: Steam 'n' Rails
- Create Stuff & Additions
- Clayworks
- Cold Sweat
- Diet
- Farmer's Delight
- Miner's Delight
- Supplementaries
- [Let's Do] API
- [Let's Do] Bakery
- [Let's Do] Brewery
- [Let's Do] HerbalBrews
- [Let's Do] Meadow
- [Let's Do] NetherVinery
- [Let's Do] Vinery
- [Let's Do] WilderNature
- [Let's Do] Camping
- [Let's Do] Farm & Charm
- Sophisticated Core
- Sophisticated Backpacks
- Immersive Aircraft
- jumbofurnace
- Just Enough Items
- Animal Feeding Trough
- Corpse
- AstikorCarts Redux
- Exposure
- Balanced Crates
- Backpacked (MrCrayfish's)
- Better Archeology
- Simple Voice Radio
- Fishermen's Trap
- Quark
- Quark Oddities
- Dragon Survival
- Warriors of Past Epoch
- Waystones
- The Aether
- Immersive Aircraft
- Immersive Machinery
- Other mods

</details>

## Description in Russian:

Форк ресурс пака Default Dark Mode суть которого иметь поддержку широкого спектра модификаций

Темы делаю и тестирую на 1.20.1+ из-за чего на более старых тема может работать некоректно

Всегда рад вам помочь с багами или сделать тёмную тему для вашего любимого мода у себя в дискорде: [https://discord.gg/ZB3QpNdZUP](https://discord.gg/ZB3QpNdZUP)
